query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS operational_flags (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  worker_id int NOT NULL,
  group_id int DEFAULT NULL,
  cost_center_id int DEFAULT NULL,
  flag_date date NOT NULL,
  flag_type enum('confirm_attendance','confirm_absence','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
  description text NOT NULL,
  status enum('pending','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  approved_by int DEFAULT NULL,
  approved_at timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  approval_notes text DEFAULT NULL,
  created_by int NOT NULL,
  created_at timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_op_flags_worker_id (worker_id),
  INDEX idx_op_flags_flag_date (flag_date),
  INDEX idx_op_flags_status (status),
  INDEX idx_op_flags_flag_type (flag_type)
);

  created_by int NOT NULL,
  created_at timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_op_flags_worker_id (worker_id),
  INDEX idx_op_flags_flag_date (flag_date),
  INDEX idx_op_flags_status (status),
  INDEX idx_op_flags_flag_type (flag_type)
);
